metadata.tagline: Purple team platform for continuous security validation
metadata.summary: Deploys a custom Go agent to endpoints, runs security tests from a git-synced library (f0_library) with MITRE ATT&CK mapping, ingests per-control results into Elasticsearch, and correlates results against Microsoft Defender alerts/Secure Score for measured defense coverage.

repo_layout.frontend: React 19 + Vite 7 + TS + Tailwind v4 + Redux + Clerk
repo_layout.backend: Express + TS (ES modules), better-sqlite3, Clerk, ES 8.x
repo_layout.backend_serverless: Fork of backend for Vercel — Turso + Vercel Blob, Cron-driven

routing.lazy_loaded: All pages except SignIn/SignUp; code splitting by route

backend.cluster_mode: CLUSTER_WORKERS=2-8 enables Node cluster; primary owns background jobs, workers serve HTTP only — prevents duplicate scheduler/sync ticks
middleware: helmet (CSP — unsafe-inline forced by Clerk SDK v5)
apiLimiter (1000 req / 15 min, skips agent device endpoints)

defender/: graph-client (custom fetch, OAuth2 client_credentials, OData paging, 429 retry)
risk-acceptance/: formal risk acceptance for security controls

background_jobs_primary_only: defender syncAlerts -> enrichmentPass -> autoResolvePass (5m, ordered, error-isolated)
backend.graceful_shutdown: SIGTERM / SIGINT clear all intervals and close http server

differences_from_backend: Signing: filesystem keypair -> SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_B64 / SIGNING_PUBLIC_KEY_B64 env vars
Scheduling: setInterval in-process -> Vercel Crons calling /api/cron/*
Test library: runtime git sync -> build-time clone via vercel-build script
Cert generation: OpenSSL CLI -> node-forge (3des PKCS#12 for OpenSSL compat)
Capabilities endpoint flags: build=false, gitSync=false, agentBuild=false
vercel_gotchas: .vercelignore replaces .gitignore for uploads — local .env can leak
echo adds \n to env vars — always use printf (CORS_ORIGIN, TURSO_DATABASE_URL break)
includeFiles required in vercel.json for static data dirs
VITE_ prefix needed for client-exposed Clerk key

internal_packages: config (config file path, server URL, agent key)
enrollment (POST /api/agent/enroll with token, persists API key)
httpclient (httpQuick 30s + httpStream — DoStream() for binaries with context.WithTimeout, see MaxDownloadTimeout)
service (Install/Uninstall — Windows SCM via sc.exe, Linux systemd, macOS launchd plist at /Library/LaunchDaemons/)
poller (heartbeat loop, task pull, server-driven cadence)
executor (run command, parse bundle_results.json, validate bundle_id matches task UUID)
queue (in-process task queue — Drain() retry semantics, currently retries 400-rejected results forever — known bug)
store (local state — last heartbeat, version, pending tasks)
sysinfo (CPU/memory/OS — sysctl/vm_stat on darwin; no CGO)
updater (self-update via atomic rename; platform-specific service restart)
agent.build: Makefile — build-all (Win/Linux/macOS amd64+arm64), sign-windows (osslsigncode + PFX), sign-darwin (rcodesign ad-hoc), checksum

signing.windows: Authenticode via osslsigncode + PFX (password via temp file, not CLI arg)

deployment_targets.name: Docker Compose
deployment_targets.profile_extra: elasticsearch profile starts ES 8.17 single-node + seeds 1000 synthetic results

deployment_targets.name: Render
deployment_targets.notes: Port 10000 default for Docker services. Blueprint deploy via render.yaml. nginx entrypoint must strip /api/ and /ws upstream blocks when VITE_API_URL is set.

deployment_targets.name: Fly.io
deployment_targets.notes: Clerk app re-assigned from Vercel — same pk_live_/sk_live_ keys work across hosts when domains match

deployment_targets.name: Vercel
deployment_targets.capabilities_endpoint: GET /api/capabilities exposes feature flags so frontend hides unsupported features

data_stores.name: SQLite (docker/render/fly/railway)
data_stores.migrations: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + incremental ALTERs; CHECK-constraint changes require table recreation pattern (FK OFF -> DROP IF EXISTS temp -> CREATE temp -> INSERT SELECT -> DROP old -> RENAME -> recreate indexes -> FK ON)

data_stores.name: Turso (Vercel)
data_stores.helper: DbHelper async wrapper; getDb() returns it (vs getDatabase() sync in non-serverless)

data_stores.name: Elasticsearch
data_stores.client: @elastic/elasticsearch 8.x — pinned, MUST match server major; v9 client sends compatible-with=9 header that ES 8.x rejects with 400

indices.name: achilles-results-*
indices.purpose: Per-control / per-stage test execution documents. Bundle controls fanned out as independent docs with composite test_uuid = <bundle-uuid>::<control-id>

indices.name: achilles-defender
indices.purpose: Defender data with doc_type discriminator (avoids 3 separate indices)

data_stores.name: File storage (filesystem or Blob)
contents: integrations.json (AES-256-GCM encrypted — Defender, Slack, Email, defender_sync state)
custom-tests/ (custom test library overlay; UUID collisions favor custom)

external_integrations.name: Clerk
external_integrations.purpose: Authentication (Sign in/up, JWT, RBAC roles, OAuth)
external_integrations.scope: All routes globally; <RequireAuth> wrapper; useAuthenticatedApi injects JWT

external_integrations.name: Microsoft Defender / Graph API
external_integrations.purpose: Pull Secure Score, alerts (v2), control profiles; PATCH alerts for auto-resolve
external_integrations.auth: OAuth2 client_credentials (Azure AD app registration, admin consent)
external_integrations.cap: 30 PATCHes per pass to protect tenant rate-limits
external_integrations.invariant: Auto-resolve NEVER writes to test docs; Defense Score is byte-identical whether enabled or disabled

external_integrations.name: Slack
external_integrations.purpose: Threshold-based alerting (Block Kit via webhook URL)

external_integrations.name: GitHub (f0_library)
external_integrations.purpose: Git-synced test library; optional GITHUB_TOKEN for metadata service

api_routes.purpose: Liveness probe (status, service name, version, ts)
Feature flags for frontend (build, buildUpload, certGenerate, certUpload, gitSync, agentBuild, platform)
Test library search, detail, MITRE mapping, build/sign/download
ES query endpoints — defense scores, heatmaps, treemaps, trends
Secure Score, alerts, controls, cross-correlation (9 endpoints)
Build system, multi-cert management, generate/upload PFX
Enrollment tokens, task creation, schedule mgmt, agent CRUD
Device endpoints — enroll, heartbeat, fetch tasks, post results, catalog, binary download, update check
External creds (Azure/Defender, Slack, Email); sync trigger; alert thresholds
status / PUT mode / GET receipts (limit, offset)
Formal risk acceptance for security controls

data_flows.name: Agent Enrollment
steps: Operator mints enrollment token via UI -> POST /api/agent/admin/enrollment-tokens (Clerk auth)
Operator pastes token into installer (Install-ProjectAchilles.ps1 / shell)
Agent: enrollment.Enroll(server, token, configPath) -> POST /api/agent/enroll with sysinfo
Backend: enrollment.service consumes token, creates agents row, returns hashed API key
Agent persists API key + server URL in config file
If --install: service.Install() registers SCM/systemd/launchd unit and starts it

data_flows.name: Heartbeat + Offline Detection
steps: Agent poller loops on a server-driven cadence: POST /api/agent/heartbeat with status/version/OS/disconnect_reason
Backend: heartbeat.service updates last_seen, version, status; pruneHeartbeatHistory hourly
Background primary: detectOfflineAgents (60s) marks stale agents offline -> alertsService.evaluateAgentAlerts triggers Slack/Email if thresholds crossed

data_flows.name: Task Execution + Bundle Results Ingestion
steps: Operator/Schedule creates task -> tasks row (status assigned)
Agent polls GET /api/agent/tasks -> receives task with bundle metadata
Agent executor downloads binary (DoStream + MaxDownloadTimeout), launches it
Test writes c:\F0\bundle_results.json (validated: bundle_id matches task UUID)
Agent POST /api/agent/tasks/:id/result with bundle_results payload
Backend results.service detects bundle_results.controls -> ingestBundleControls() fans out via client.bulk()
Each control becomes an independent ES doc in achilles-results-* with composite test_uuid = <bundle-uuid>::<control-id>
Alerting service evaluates thresholds -> may dispatch Slack/Email
If sync ingest fails -> startIngestionRetryWorker drains (5m loop, capped MAX_INGEST_ATTEMPTS=10)
data_flows.frontend_grouping: Executions table groups bundle controls under collapsible parent rows; parent shows X/Y Protected badge; cyber-hygiene shows 'X controls', other categories 'X stages'; skipped stages (non-cyber-hygiene exit_code=0) excluded from Protected/Unprotected count

data_flows.name: Defender Sync (5-minute loop)
steps: syncAlerts: graph-client paginates Graph API alerts v2, upserts into achilles-defender (doc_type=alert), uses lastUpdateDateTime||createdDateTime as 'timestamp'

runEnrichmentPass: per page msearch achilles-results-* with wildcard on evidence_filenames.keyword + evidence_hostnames.keyword, -5/+30 min window; tags matches with f0rtika.achilles_correlated/_test_uuid/_matched_at
Eager per-stage enrichment: sets f0rtika.defender_detected=true on the matching test doc so Defense Score 'any-stage' query is correct (dual-query: score=combined, realScore=EDR-only)
runAutoResolvePass: if mode != 'disabled', PATCH each correlated alert with status=resolved, classification=informationalExpectedActivity, determination=securityTesting + audit comment
Each step error-isolated (catches own errors so one failure doesn't silence the others); 30 PATCH/pass cap
data_flows.invariant: Auto-resolve NEVER writes to test docs; Defense Score byte-identical regardless of auto-resolve state

data_flows.name: Defender Secure Score (6-hour loop)
steps: syncSecureScores -> achilles-defender doc_type=secure_score
syncControlProfiles -> achilles-defender doc_type=control_profile
Frontend Analytics: cross-correlation queries plot Defense Score vs Secure Score over time, MITRE technique overlap heatmap

data_flows.name: Scheduled Runs
steps: Operator creates schedule (cron-like) -> schedules row
Docker/Render/Fly: setInterval processSchedules (60s) — primary only
Vercel: Vercel Cron hits /api/cron/schedules on tick
Due schedules -> enqueue tasks for matching agents
Startup recovery: processSchedules runs once on boot to catch past-due

data_flows.name: Auto Key Rotation
steps: Cert/agent key rotation policy -> processAutoRotation (60s primary / Vercel Cron)
Generates new keypair, propagates via update channel, archives old (max 5 retained)

data_flows.name: Threshold Alerting
steps: Result ingestion (results.service) -> after successful ES write, alerting.service evaluates Score drop % and absolute floor against per-metric config
If threshold crossed: slack.service builds Block Kit message -> POST to webhook; email.service builds + sends via SMTP
Frontend NotificationBell polls for unseen events

data_flows.name: CLI Device Flow
steps: CLI: POST /api/cli/auth/start -> device_code + user_code + verification_uri
User opens /cli-auth in browser (Clerk-authenticated), enters user_code, approves
CLI: poll /api/cli/auth/poll with device_code -> receives CLI JWT
Subsequent CLI calls: acceptCliAuth middleware bridges CLI JWT into req.auth so downstream Clerk checks pass

background_jobs.name: defenderSyncAlerts -> enrichmentPass -> autoResolvePass
background_jobs.purpose: Pull alerts -> correlate to tests -> optionally PATCH resolved

windows.password_passing: Temp file (not CLI arg) — F0_SIGN_CERT_PATH + F0_SIGN_CERT_PASS_FILE env vars piped to build_all.sh; PASS_FILE mode 0o600, deleted in finally
windows.scope: Both agent builds (agentBuild.service) and test binaries (buildService)

code_signing.fault_tolerance: Signing failures are non-fatal — builds continue unsigned

auth_model.global: Clerk JWT for every dashboard route via <RequireAuth>
auth_model.rbac: Clerk roles -> useAppRole/useCanAccessModule + <RequireModule> + server-side admin-only checks
auth_model.analytics_extra_gate: AnalyticsAuthProvider redirects to /settings if Elasticsearch unconfigured
auth_model.agent_device: Per-agent API key hashed in agents table; rate-limited separately from dashboard
auth_model.cli: Device flow (POST /api/cli/auth/start -> user approves at /cli-auth -> CLI gets short-lived JWT; acceptCliAuth bridges into req.auth)

code_patterns.backend_es_module_imports: Must use .js extension in imports (TypeScript compiles to .js). Missing .js fails at runtime.
code_patterns.typescript_style: Strict mode; avoid any; use 'import type' for type-only; satisfy noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters
code_patterns.backend_error_handling: asyncHandler wrapper + AppError(message, status) thrown for HTTP errors; response shape { success: false, error }
code_patterns.frontend_imports: Use @/ alias for src/; group external -> internal
code_patterns.backend_test_pattern: vi.mock('../database.js') with let-bound testDb (createTestDatabase :memory:); dynamic import of module under test AFTER mock setup
code_patterns.frontend_test_setup: All Clerk hooks mocked globally in frontend/src/__tests__/setup.ts

gotchas.issue: Recharts sets stroke='var(--background)' on parent SVG; SVG stroke is inherited -> text glyphs get dark outlines in dark mode. Always set stroke='none' on <text> in custom Treemap renderers.

No ALTER COLUMN — CHECK-constraint changes need full table swap. Always DROP IF EXISTS temp first (crash recovery), disable FKs via database.pragma() not exec(), full pattern: FK OFF -> DROP temp -> CREATE temp -> INSERT SELECT -> DROP old -> RENAME -> recreate indexes -> FK ON.
Stay on @elastic/elasticsearch 8.x — v9 sends compatible-with=9 header that ES 8.x rejects with 400. Watch Dependabot.
echo adds \n — always use printf when piping to vercel env add (breaks CORS_ORIGIN, TURSO_DATABASE_URL parsers).
Bundle control test_uuid = <bundle-uuid>::<control-id>. Use split('::') — :: is unambiguous (UUIDs and control IDs only contain hyphens).
RSA-4096 takes 2-8s pure JS (OK on Pro 60s timeout, tight on Hobby 10s); uses 3des for PKCS#12 (not AES) for OpenSSL compat; X.509 time second-precision — truncate ms.

Only external (non-source-built) missing deps block Build button + show Upload. Source-built deps show wrench + 'Auto-built'. saveUploadedFile rejects uploads for source-built deps. 4 detection heuristics in isSourceBuiltBinary().

Mapping drift: evidence_filenames/_hostnames were dynamically mapped as text+.keyword (not keyword as code declared) -> query .keyword subfield. Time field: filter on 'timestamp' (=lastUpdateDateTime||createdDateTime), not 'created_at' — reused alerts have fresh updates but stale created dates.
Schedules configured 09:00 Europe/London fire at 00:00 UTC instead — laptops asleep -> 'agent offline' cascade. Root cause of ~72% TPSGL failures.
agent/internal/queue/queue.go:100-108 retries 400-rejected results forever; amplifies timezone bug impact.
tasks.service.ts:1044 should include 'assigned' status; without it tasks zombie for 7d until TTL sweep.

workflows: .github/workflows/ci.yml — test-backend (npm ci -> build -> test), test-frontend (same), backend-serverless tests
security: Semgrep SAST — 11 community rulesets + 11 custom rules
Claude security review skipped on Dependabot PRs (no secret access)
